3017030.name: Cursed House 5
3017030.description:
Cursed House 5 is a game in the Match 3 puzzle genre, where levels are completed in a specific sequence of actions.
For the first time in this series, Cursed House introduces a bonus system that will remain with minimal changes in several upcoming projects.
The game includes:

90 Match 3 levels
10 Hidden Object scenes
10 Spot the Difference scenes
20 Solitaire games
A beautiful old mansion that needs to be restored and cleansed of evil spirits
